data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Designs focus on decision-making efficiency by limiting choices.
data.technical_spec: UI displays minimalistic options for ease of navigation.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Enhances target accessibility to facilitate easy user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Critical buttons and links are large and easily clickable.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Designs are consistent with user expectations to reduce cognitive load.
data.technical_spec: Interfaces are similar across devices and adhere to common patterns.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing designs that enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: High-quality imagery and animations to draw user engagement.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Applies user chunking to manage information complexity.
data.technical_spec: Content is grouped into manageable, digestible units.
